title: Update SubtitleDao with deleteByVideoId method
description: Add deleteByVideoId(videoId: String) to SubtitleDao interface to allow bulk deletion of subtitles by video ID.

title: Update HomeViewModel with deleteLibraryItem
description: Expose deleteLibraryItem(item: LibraryItem) in HomeViewModel to allow deleting library items. Depends on DAO update.

title: Implement Swipe to Delete UI
description: Implement the 'swipe-to-delete' gesture in the Library view using SwipeToDismissBox.
